emails.subject: RuPay Debit MDR revision — Neoflo programme
emails.body:
Hi Aditya, team,

Further to the QBR last week, we're revising the RuPay Debit MDR for the Neoflo programme to 0.48% with effect from 1 May 2026. I've looped in Nikhil from our Treasury desk who's driving the repricing. Kindly update your books and confirm once done.

Best regards,
Rohan Mehta
Key Accounts, HDFC Bank

emails.subject: Re: RuPay Debit MDR revision — Neoflo programme
emails.body:
Hi Rohan,

Thanks for the note. Before we book it — just confirming this is 0.48% on RuPay Debit GMV, effective 1 May, superseding the current 0.45% on our card? Adding Fatima from my team who'll process the rate-card update.

Regards,
Finance Ops, Neoflo

emails.subject: Re: RuPay Debit MDR revision — Neoflo programme
emails.body:
Yes, 0.48% superseding 0.45%. Let me get Treasury to put the final number in writing before you lock it — Nikhil is validating against the network circular today.

— Rohan

emails.subject: Re: RuPay Debit MDR revision — Neoflo programme
emails.body:
Nikhil here from HDFC Treasury. Still reconciling the RuPay slab against the revised interchange — I'll revert with the confirmed number by tomorrow. Please hold the update until then.

Regards,
Nikhil Verma
Treasury, HDFC Bank

emails.subject: Re: RuPay Debit MDR revision — Neoflo programme
emails.cc: Nikhil Verma, Aditya Rao, Fatima Sheikh
emails.body:
Apologies for the churn, team — correction on my earlier note. Treasury has now finalised RuPay Debit at 0.50%, not 0.48%. The 0.50% is the agreed number, effective 1st May 2026. Please book against this.

— Rohan

emails.subject: Re: RuPay Debit MDR revision — Neoflo programme
emails.body:
Understood Rohan — booking RuPay Debit at 0.50% effective 1 May 2026 and retiring the older rate-card versions. Fatima will push the update today.

— Finance Ops

emails.subject: Re: RuPay Debit MDR revision — Neoflo programme
emails.body:
Hi all, Sana from HDFC ops here. Sharing the signed pricing addendum for your records (attached). This is just the paperwork for what Rohan confirmed — no change to the agreed terms. Do reach me for any settlement queries going forward.

Regards,
Sana Kapadia
HDFC Bank

emails.subject: Axis Credit Card — renewal confirmation
emails.body:
Hello,

Confirming the renewal of the Axis Credit Card programme for Neoflo. The renewed rate is 0.42% on credit card GMV, effective 1 May 2026. The prior agreement lapsed at the end of April; this renewal supersedes it. Copying Ritu from Legal who will send the renewal paperwork.

Regards,
Karan Shah
Partnerships, Axis Bank

emails.subject: Re: Axis Credit Card — renewal confirmation
emails.body:
Thanks Karan — to confirm, the previous Axis CC term lapsed 30 Apr and 0.42% applies from 1 May. We'd flagged this as an expired term on our side, so this clears it. Ritu, please send the addendum when ready.

— Finance Ops

emails.subject: Re: Axis Credit Card — renewal confirmation
emails.body:
Hi, Ritu from Axis Legal. Attaching the countersigned renewal addendum for the Credit Card programme — commercial terms are exactly as Karan set out, nothing new to action. Please retain for your records.

Best,
Ritu Desai
Legal, Axis Bank

emails.subject: Re: Axis Credit Card — renewal confirmation
emails.body:
Received, thanks Ritu. Filed against the renewal. Marking the expired term cleared on our end.

— Finance Ops

emails.subject: Go-live: YesBank UPI pricing for Neoflo
emails.body:
Team,

We're live on UPI for Neoflo as of this week. Pricing is Rs 0.30 per transaction, w.e.f 1 May 2026. There's no prior arrangement — this is the first UPI term between us. Ananya from our ops team (cc'd) will share the daily settlement MIS. Let me know once it's reflected your side.

Thanks,
Vikram Rao
Yes Bank

emails.subject: Re: Go-live: YesBank UPI pricing for Neoflo
emails.body:
Great news Vikram. Adding YesBank UPI at Rs 0.30/txn effective 1 May. Since there was no term on file we'd been holding this volume un-billable — good to get it in. Will confirm once the rate card is updated.

— Finance Ops

emails.subject: Re: Go-live: YesBank UPI pricing for Neoflo
emails.body:
Hi, Ananya from YesBank ops. First week's UPI settlement MIS is on the shared SFTP. Purely informational — no change to the Rs 0.30/txn we agreed. Flag any reconciliation gaps and I'll chase them.

Regards,
Ananya Bose
Yes Bank

emails.subject: RBL Wallet — commercial terms
emails.body:
Hi,

Pleased to share the agreed commercials for the RBL Wallet integration: 0.55% of wallet GMV, effective from 1 May 2026. This is a fresh arrangement — there was no prior term on file. Looping in Farhan who'll run the onboarding.

Best,
Meera Joshi
RBL Bank

emails.subject: Re: RBL Wallet — commercial terms
emails.body:
Thanks Meera — confirming RBL Wallet at 0.55% from 1 May. This volume was sitting un-billable with no rate on file, so this is exactly what we needed. Fatima is updating the rate card now.

— Finance Ops

emails.subject: Re: RBL Wallet — commercial terms
emails.body:
Hello, Farhan from RBL onboarding. Sharing the integration checklist and test credentials — this is technical only, the 0.55% commercial term stands as Meera confirmed. Let's target production cutover next week.

Regards,
Farhan Qureshi
RBL Bank

emails.subject: IndusInd Net Banking — renewal
emails.body:
Hello team,

The Net Banking arrangement that expired on 31 March has now been renewed. The new fee is Rs 9.00 per transaction, effective 1 May 2026. Please bring this back into billing. Kavya from ops (cc'd) will send the signed letter.

Regards,
Arjun Reddy
IndusInd Bank

emails.subject: Re: IndusInd Net Banking — renewal
emails.body:
Thanks Arjun — we'd parked IndusInd Net Banking as an expired term and held the claim. Bringing it back into billing at Rs 9.00/txn from 1 May.

— Finance Ops

emails.subject: Re: IndusInd Net Banking — renewal
emails.body:
Hi, Kavya from IndusInd ops. Attaching the signed renewal letter for your file — it mirrors the Rs 9.00/txn Arjun confirmed, no new terms. Reach me for settlement queries.

Regards,
Kavya Nair
IndusInd Bank

emails.subject: ICICI Credit Card — rate reduction
emails.body:
Hi,

Following the volume review, ICICI is reducing the Credit Card MDR for Neoflo to 0.18% effective 1 May 2026. Please ensure you are not billing the older, higher rate from this month onward.

— Priya Nair
ICICI Bank

emails.subject: Re: ICICI Credit Card — rate reduction
emails.body:
Noted Priya. We'll stop applying the prior rate from the May cycle and switch to the reduced rate. Flagging internally so we don't over-bill on the changeover — Fatima, please prioritise this one.

— Finance Ops

emails.subject: Re: ICICI Credit Card — rate reduction
emails.body:
Confirming I've staged the ICICI CC change so the May cycle bills at the reduced rate, not the old card rate. No further input needed from ICICI — this is an internal note.

— Fatima Sheikh, Neoflo

emails.subject: SBI RuPay Debit — confirmation of existing rate
emails.body:
Hi,

Just confirming for your records that the SBI RuPay Debit rate remains 0.40%, unchanged for the May cycle. No action needed from your end.

Regards,
Anil Kapoor
State Bank of India

emails.subject: Re: SBI RuPay Debit — confirmation of existing rate
emails.body:
Thanks Anil — confirmed, no change on our side either. Our card already reads 0.40%, so nothing to update. Closing this out.

— Finance Ops

emails.subject: Kotak UPI — revised per-txn fee
emails.body:
Team,

Please note the Kotak UPI per-transaction fee is being revised to Rs 0.32 with effect from 1 May 2026, in line with the recent network changes. Circular attached.

Regards,
Sneha Iyer
Kotak Mahindra Bank

emails.subject: Re: Kotak UPI — revised per-txn fee
emails.body:
Thanks Sneha — noted, we'll move Kotak UPI to Rs 0.32/txn from 1 May. Our card currently sits lower, so we'll add the revised term.

— Finance Ops

emails.subject: Re: Kotak UPI — revised per-txn fee
emails.body:
Thanks for the quick turnaround. The network circular I referenced is attached again for completeness — no change to the Rs 0.32 already confirmed.

— Sneha

emails.subject: PNB RuPay Debit — concessional rate
emails.body:
Hi,

As discussed on our call, PNB is offering a concessional RuPay Debit rate of 0.36% for Neoflo, effective this month. Please update your records.

— Deepa Menon
Punjab National Bank

emails.subject: Re: PNB RuPay Debit — concessional rate
emails.body:
Thanks Deepa — to be precise for our books, can you confirm the effective date is 1 May 2026? We'll lower the RuPay Debit rate to 0.36% accordingly.

— Finance Ops

emails.subject: Re: PNB RuPay Debit — concessional rate
emails.body:
Confirmed — 0.36% on RuPay Debit, effective 1 May 2026. Please go ahead and update.

— Deepa Menon, Punjab National Bank

emails.subject: HDFC Credit Card — minor revision
emails.body:
Minor update: the HDFC Credit Card MDR moves to 0.21% from 1 May 2026. It's marginal, but flagging so the books stay in sync.

— Rohan Mehta, HDFC Bank

emails.subject: Re: HDFC Credit Card — minor revision
emails.body:
Thanks Rohan — noted, we'll nudge HDFC Credit Card to 0.21% from 1 May.

— Finance Ops

emails.subject: Re: HDFC Credit Card — minor revision
emails.body:
Sana here — acknowledging on Rohan's behalf, the 0.21% is correct. Nothing further needed.

— Sana Kapadia, HDFC Bank

emails.subject: Catch-up + Federal Wallet pricing
emails.body:
Folks,

Couple of things from the Federal call. They were happy with the ramp and want to push volume. On commercials, Federal confirmed Wallet at 0.50% effective 1 May (it was verbal earlier, now in writing). They'll also send the UPI MIS by Friday and want a roadmap review next month.

Let's sync Monday.

— Aditya Rao

emails.subject: Re: Catch-up + Federal Wallet pricing
emails.body:
Thanks Aditya. I'll add Federal Wallet at 0.50% from 1 May to the rate card and reconcile the un-billed volume. Will pick up the UPI MIS separately once it lands.

— Finance Ops

emails.subject: Settlement file for April — shared
emails.body: Hi all, the April settlement file is on the shared drive. Numbers tally with the bank statements. Note HDFC processed roughly 0.4 million transactions last month — good growth. No pricing changes here, just FYI. — AR Team

emails.subject: Festive offer — cashback campaign
emails.body: Hello, SBI is running a festive cashback of up to Rs 500 for cardholders in May. This is a consumer promo and does not affect your MDR. Sharing for awareness. — Anil

emails.subject: Scheduled downtime notice
emails.body: Team, Kotak net banking will have a maintenance window on 18 May, 1-3 AM. No commercial impact. Regards, Sneha

emails.subject: KYC documentation request
emails.body: Hi, we need updated KYC documents for the Neoflo entity for our annual refresh. Please share the certificate of incorporation. Nothing to do with pricing. — Priya

emails.subject: Re: QBR deck
emails.body: Attached the QBR deck draft. Slide 7 has the GMV split. We grew 12% MoM. Let's review before sending. — AR Team

emails.subject: Holiday calendar 2026
emails.body: Sharing the Axis settlement holiday calendar for the rest of 2026 so you can plan cut-offs. No rate changes. — Karan

emails.subject: Contact update
emails.body: Please note my colleague Sana will be your secondary contact going forward. Reach either of us for ops queries. — Rohan

emails.subject: Reminder: month-end reconciliation
emails.body: Reminder to close the May reconciliation by the 5th. Flagging that YesBank UPI and RBL Wallet still need rate-card entries — chasing the banks separately. — AR Team

emails.subject: Webinar invite — digital payments
emails.body: You're invited to our digital payments webinar on 25 May. Topics include UPI trends. Purely informational. — Deepa

emails.subject: Thank you note
emails.body: Thanks for a smooth go-live this week. Looking forward to scaling UPI volumes together. — Vikram

emails.subject: Quarterly business review — scheduling
emails.body: Can we lock the QBR for the first week of June? Proposing 3rd or 4th. Agenda to follow. — Priya

emails.subject: FYI: new merchant onboarded
emails.body: Onboarded Pyrite Systems this week, routing via HDFC and Axis. Standard rates apply, nothing bespoke. — AR Team

emails.subject: Survey: partner satisfaction
emails.body: We'd value your feedback in our annual partner survey. Takes 5 minutes. No pricing content. — Sneha

emails.subject: Intro — Federal relationship manager
emails.body: Hello, introducing myself as your new RM at Federal. Happy to help with any ops or commercial questions. — Federal Team

emails.subject: Re: settlement variance Apr
emails.body: The Rs 2 lakh variance in April was a timing difference, now squared off. No action. — AR Team
